title: Metric-to-Metric Linking with Relationship Types
story: As a data analyst, I want to link metrics to each other with typed relationships (e.g., 'Included in calc for', 'Segment of', 'Direct Impacts'), so that I can model how metrics build on and relate to one another in a hierarchical tree.
description:
Adds the ability to create directional, typed relationships between metrics. Metrics often build on each other in parent-child hierarchies with different relationship semantics. The linking is done bottom-up — from a child metric, the user associates a parent and selects the relationship type.

Relationship types:
- Included in calc for [Parent Metric]
- Segment of [Parent Metric]
- Direct Impacts [Parent Metric]
- Included in calculation [Parent Metric]

A new 'Link' tab in the sidebar allows users to select a metric from a searchable dropdown and choose a relationship type. The current metric is excluded from the dropdown. Linked metrics appear in a table below with options to remove. Navigation between metrics updates the linked list.

The data model uses a junction table (MetricLink) with parent_metric_id, child_metric_id, and relationship_type_id, plus a separate relationship type table.
acceptance_criteria: A 'Link' tab appears in the sidebar detail panel
User can search and select a metric from a dropdown to link
The currently selected metric is excluded from the dropdown options
User selects a relationship type from the four predefined options
Linked metrics appear in a table with relationship type and remove option
Navigating to next/previous metric updates the linked metrics list
Junction table stores parent_metric_id, child_metric_id, and relationship_type_id
ux_changes: New 'Link' tab in the sidebar with a searchable metric dropdown, relationship type dropdown, and a table of linked metrics. Current metric excluded from selection options.
middleware_changes: CRUD service for metric link management. Query to fetch linked metrics with their relationship types.
data_model_changes: New relationship_types table for the four link types. New MetricLink junction table with parent_metric_id, child_metric_id, and relationship_type_id foreign keys.
api_changes: Endpoints for creating, listing, and deleting metric links. Linked metrics endpoint returns resolved metric names and relationship type labels.
implementation_notes: Sidebar tabs reorganized to accommodate the new Link tab. Modeled after Jira's link-issue pattern. Branch-based development to avoid impacting staging.
comment_summary: Developer proposed junction table model, confirmed with screenshots. Sidebar tabs reorganized. Linked metrics update on navigation. Built on a separate branch and merged to staging after review.
